task_description: Upgrade the Streamlit data analysis app to enterprise/international standard quality. Add online data fetching (URL fetch, public dataset catalog, web scraping), report generation (HTML reports with charts and AI summaries), fix bugs (st.set_page_config ordering, edge cases, error handling), and add premium features (caching, export buttons, improved AI prompts, session state management).

verification.summary: All dependencies install successfully. All 6 pages and all utility modules pass AST syntax validation. All module imports succeed. Report generation produces valid 61K+ char HTML. Dataset catalog contains 18 entries. DataFrame validation correctly handles edge cases. st.set_page_config is confirmed as first st.* call in every page file.
